case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. IRENE CARTAGENA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IRENE CARTAGENA IS PRESENT. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARTAGENA, IRENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-01-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR WAS NOT SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IRENE CARTAGENA IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
